title: mentha × rotundifolia f. glabrescens
intro: Mentha × rotundifolia f. glabrescens, also known as sweet woodruff, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used for centuries in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant. The health benefits of sweet woodruff include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce anxiety and stress, and provide relief from insomnia, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health. Sweet woodruff can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
